things.name: The Bund
things.description: Shanghai's iconic waterfront promenade lined with Art Deco colonial buildings facing Pudong

things.name: Yu Garden (Yuyuan Garden)
things.description: 16th-century classical Ming garden with rockeries, pavilions and the famous zigzag bridge

things.name: Shanghai Tower Observation Deck
things.description: Views from China's tallest building at 632m with the world's fastest elevator

things.name: French Concession
things.description: Tree-lined streets with Art Deco mansions, boutiques, jazz bars and excellent restaurants

things.name: Shanghai Museum
things.description: World-class collection of Chinese bronzes, ceramics, jade and ancient painting

things.name: Zhujiajiao Water Town
things.description: Ming-dynasty canal town with stone bridges, gondola rides and traditional food

things.name: Tianzifang Alleyway Market
things.description: Shikumen stone-gate houses converted into boutiques, cafes and art galleries

things.name: Shanghai Disneyland
things.description: Walt Disney's most technologically advanced theme park with unique Chinese cultural elements

things.name: Jade Buddha Temple
things.description: Active monastery with two white jade Buddhas brought from Burma in 1882

things.name: Shanghai World Financial Center Sky Walk
things.description: The bottle-opener skyscraper with a glass floor observation deck at 474m
